name: datahub-context-compass
description: Metadata risk brief generator for DataHub-style context snapshots.

scripts.check: node --check src/analyze.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/renderSite.js && node --check test/analyze.test.js
scripts.build: node src/cli.js examples/metadata-snapshot.json reports/sample-risk-brief.md reports/sample-risk-brief.json && node src/renderSite.js reports/sample-risk-brief.json public/index.html
